c74object.name: airfx.slew~
c74object.digest: Slew is a slew clipper, which darkens treble in an unusual way.
c74object.description: Slew is a slew clipper, which darkens treble in an unusual way.
c74object.discussion: Slew is the very first plugin I made for Airwindows (or at least the first one listed on this website).Slew is a simple plugin to let you do slew clipping. You can use it to morph and transform percussive sounds or hats, you can give a unique and interesting ‘grind’ to instruments or glue stuff together into a retro, old-school-sampler, grungey grind, or you can use it on things like reverb sends to really amp up the sense of distant loud sound in a room or space.

method.name: about
method.digest: Get the original Airwindows "about" text for this object
method.description: Prints the original Airwindows description for this plugin out the dump outlet.
